PropertyTypes.Caption: Series
PropertyTypes.Description: Add series and configure their properties

PropertyTypes.Caption: Data source
PropertyTypes.Description: Data points for a single series.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Data source
PropertyTypes.Description: Data points for all series which will be divided into single series based on the Group by attribute value.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Group by
PropertyTypes.Description: Data points within the same group form one series.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Series name
PropertyTypes.Description: The series name displayed in the legend.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Series name
PropertyTypes.Description: The series name displayed in the legend.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Aggregation function
PropertyTypes.Description: Defines how data is aggregated when multiple Y values are available for a single X value

PropertyTypes.Caption: Width unit
PropertyTypes.Description: Percentage: portion of parent size. Pixels: absolute amount of pixels.
